aboutPage.metaDesc: We supply Lithuanian hairdressers and salons with professional work tools. Our mission — high-quality, economical dyes in 180 ml packaging.
aboutPage.title: We supply hairdressers with work tools they can
aboutPage.subtitle: Our goal is simple — to help hairdressers and colourists work more efficiently. Professional products, smart pricing and real value for everyday salon work.
aboutPage.imagePlaceholder: Professional hair dye salon — Dažai Kirpėjams team
aboutPage.storyP1: It all started with a simple observation: Lithuanian hairdressers pay too much for professional hair dyes. Many suppliers offer 60–100 ml packages at prices that don't always match the reality of daily work. Hairdressers use dyes every day — it's their primary work tool, not a luxury item. We decided there had to be a better way.
aboutPage.storyP2: We established direct relationships with Italian manufacturers and brought Color SHOCK to the Lithuanian market — a professional hair dye line in 180 ml packages. That's two to three times more than the standard package on the market. The formula with Argan and Jojoba oils and rose extract ensures quality results, while the larger volume means a lower cost per application. Alongside Color SHOCK, we also introduced RosaNera Cosmetic — a professional hair care line that perfectly complements the colouring process.
aboutPage.storyP3: Today we work with hairdressers, colourists and beauty salons across Lithuania. We don't aspire to be just another "beauty" company with empty promises. Our approach is pragmatic: a good work tool must be reliable, economical and easily accessible. That's exactly what we offer.
aboutPage.missionSubtitle: Our mission — to supply hairdressers with high-quality, economical work tools. Not "beauty" industry cliches, but practical value for everyday work.
aboutPage.missionCard1Desc: Professional formula from Italy — quality ingredients at a smart price. Larger packaging means lower cost per application.
aboutPage.missionCard2Desc: Every decision we make is based on one question: does this make the hairdresser's daily work easier?
aboutPage.missionCard3Desc: We work exclusively with professionals. We understand their needs, so we can offer exactly what's required.
aboutPage.brandsSubtitle: Two brands — everything needed for professional salon work

founder.title: Džiuljeta Vėbrė
founder.subtitle: Experience that turns into professional solutions for hairdressers
paragraphs: Džiuljeta Vėbrė is a leading figure in the Lithuanian beauty industry — a name associated with professionalism, decades of experience, a strong aesthetic sense and real solutions for beauty specialists. She is known as a hairstylist, makeup artist, image designer, lecturer, book author and creator who has consistently shaped a higher standard of work for the beauty professional for many years.

More than three decades of accumulated experience have allowed her to know the beauty industry from within, not from the surface. Through these years she has worked on client image, trained both aspiring and practising specialists, delivered seminars, built a professional direction and helped hairdressers understand that real professionalism does not start with a beautiful photo — it starts with knowledge, practice, discipline and the right choice of working tools.

Džiuljeta Vėbrė’s work has always been broader than just cutting or colouring. Her view of beauty rests on the whole picture: facial features, personal character, colour type, lifestyle, styling — and the professional’s ability to turn it all into a clear, aesthetic and client-fitting result. This is not an accidental sense of beauty. It is a refined philosophy of experience in which every detail matters.

It is for this reason that her name is naturally connected with the professional hairdressing market and with what truly matters in everyday salon work. The same logic is reflected directly in the direction of DažaiKirpėjams.lt. This is not an ordinary store. It is a place built around the hairdresser-professional who chooses not just anything, but what helps to work efficiently, with quality and economically.

In a hairdresser’s work, everything matters: colour accuracy, product stability, reliable coverage, cost control and trust in what you use every single day. That is why professional dyes are not just a tool. They are part of the result. They are part of the master’s reputation. They are part of the business.

This is exactly where Džiuljeta Vėbrė’s professional philosophy and the direction of DažaiKirpėjams.lt come together very clearly. Both rest on the same principle: a professional needs not noise but quality; not promises but results; not a pretty label but a solution that actually works in real life.

DažaiKirpėjams.lt offers professional hair dyes and supplies for hairdressers, where what matters is not only the result but the practical benefit to the salon. The larger 180 ml capacity, the professional formula, the focus on daily use and rational salon work — this is a direction that perfectly matches the modern hairdresser’s need to work smartly, steadily and profitably.

This is especially important today, when the beauty specialist must be not only a creator but also a strategist. They must be able to manage the result, the time, the cost base and client expectations. This is the very approach that Džiuljeta Vėbrė reflects in her own professional path. Years of practice taught her one very important thing: quality in the salon starts with choices. With what you choose to wear. With the tools you choose to work with. With how much you trust your own system.

That is why Džiuljeta Vėbrė is not only a beauty specialist. She is an authority whose experience helps shape a more professional, stronger and higher-value approach to the hairdresser’s work. And DažaiKirpėjams.lt is a natural continuation of this approach — a platform for those who want to work not just somehow, but professionally.
manifesto: It is a space for hairdressers who value quality.
It is a direction for salons that count not only today, but the long-term benefit.
It is the choice of those who understand that a strong result is born when talent meets the right tools.
founder.closing: Džiuljeta Vėbrė and DažaiKirpėjams.lt are more than a name and an online store. They are a connection between professionalism, experience and a real understanding of salon work. They are an approach to the beauty industry where it matters not only to look professional — but to actually be one, every single day.

termsPage.metaDesc: General terms and conditions of purchase at the www.dazaikirpejams.lt online store.
termsPage.subtitle: General terms and conditions of purchase at the www.dazaikirpejams.lt online store.
termsPage.content:
Last updated: 2026-04-20

1. General Provisions

These Terms and Conditions of Sale (the “Terms”) constitute a binding legal agreement between the Buyer and the Seller, setting out the parties' rights, obligations and liability when purchasing goods at the www.dazaikirpejams.lt online store (the “Store”).

By placing an order the Buyer confirms that they have read, understood and accepted these Terms, and that their personal data will be processed in accordance with our Privacy Policy.

2. Seller (legal details)

  • Legal name: Džiuljetos Vėbrės individuali veikla (sole proprietorship)
  • Activity registration code: 47003130637
  • Address: Taikos pr. 32, LT-50246 Kaunas, Republic of Lithuania
  • Email: info@dazaikirpejams.lt
  • Phone: +370 680 47667
  • VAT-registered: No

3. Conclusion of the Purchase Agreement

The purchase agreement is concluded at the moment the Buyer, having selected the goods, formed the basket and provided delivery and payment details, clicks the “Place order” button. The agreement remains in force until both parties have fully performed their obligations.

After placing an order the Buyer receives an email confirmation containing the order number and a summary.

4. Prices, Taxes and Payment

Prices in the Store are quoted in euros (€) and are final — Lithuanian VAT (21 %) is included where applicable. The delivery fee is shown separately in the basket before order confirmation.

Accepted payment methods:

  • Bank transfer based on a pro-forma invoice sent by email
  • Payment cards (Visa, Mastercard) via Paysera
  • Online banking via Paysera (Paysera LT, UAB, code 300060819)

Order processing begins once payment is received.

5. Delivery

Delivery methods, lead times and prices are described on the Delivery and Returns page. Standard delivery takes 1–3 business days from receipt of payment. Delivery is currently available only within the Republic of Lithuania.

6. Right of withdrawal (14 days)

The Buyer (consumer) has the right to withdraw from this distance contract within 14 calendar days from the date of receiving the goods, without giving any reason (Lithuanian Civil Code Art. 6.228⁵ and 6.228¹⁰).

To exercise this right, the Buyer must inform the Seller of the decision by an unambiguous statement sent by email to info@dazaikirpejams.lt or by using the model withdrawal form below.

Returned goods must be undamaged, retain their commercial appearance (labels and protective films intact), be unused and in the original packaging. Direct return shipping costs are borne by the Buyer, except where the goods were defective.

The refund will be transferred to the Buyer's account within 14 days of the Seller receiving the withdrawal notice, but no earlier than the goods are returned to the Seller.

Exceptions to the right of withdrawal

Pursuant to Art. 6.228¹⁰(2) of the Lithuanian Civil Code and the Retail Trade Rules, the right of withdrawal does not apply to:

  • Cosmetic and hygiene products that have been unsealed after delivery (cardboard packaging opened, protective film or membrane removed) — for reasons of hygiene or health protection;
  • Goods made to the Buyer's specifications or clearly personalised;
  • Goods which after delivery, due to their nature, are inseparably mixed with other items.

7. Model withdrawal form

(Complete and return this form only if you wish to withdraw from the contract)

To: Džiuljetos Vėbrės individuali veikla, Taikos pr. 32, LT-50246 Kaunas, info@dazaikirpejams.lt
I/We (*) hereby give notice that I/we (*) withdraw from my/our (*) contract of sale of the following goods:
– Date of order / receipt: ____________
– Order number: ____________
– Consumer's name: ____________
– Consumer's address: ____________
– Consumer's signature (only if submitted on paper): ____________
– Date: ____________
(*) Delete as appropriate.

8. Quality and Warranty

All goods sold are covered by the manufacturer's warranty and the quality requirements set out in Lithuanian law. In the case of defective goods, the Buyer has the right to a replacement of equivalent quality or a refund within 14 days of submitting the claim.

9. Liability

The Seller is not liable for damage arising from incorrect or inaccurate information provided by the Buyer, or from improper use of the goods or use that does not follow the manufacturer's instructions. Professional cosmetics are intended for use by qualified specialists.

10. Force Majeure

The parties are released from their obligations where performance becomes impossible due to force majeure circumstances within the meaning of Art. 6.212 of the Lithuanian Civil Code (state of war, emergency situations, decisions of public authorities, infrastructure failures, etc.).

11. Personal Data

The Buyer's personal data is processed in accordance with our Privacy Policy, which complies with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the Lithuanian Law on Legal Protection of Personal Data.

12. Intellectual Property

All Store content (texts, product descriptions, photographs, logos, design) belongs to the Seller or is used with appropriate authorisation. Copying, distribution or commercial use of the content without the Seller's written consent is prohibited.

13. Dispute Resolution

Any disputes shall first be resolved through negotiation. If no agreement is reached, disputes shall be settled in the Lithuanian court of jurisdiction at the Seller's registered address.

Consumers may contact the State Consumer Rights Protection Authority (Vilniaus g. 25, 01402 Vilnius, www.vvtat.lt) or use the European Commission Online Dispute Resolution (ODR) platform: ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr.

14. Final Provisions

These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Lithuania. The Seller reserves the right to amend the Terms unilaterally. Amendments take effect from the date of publication in the Store and apply to all orders placed thereafter.

privacyPage.metaDesc: Information about the processing of Your personal data in accordance with GDPR requirements.
privacyPage.subtitle: Information about the processing of Your personal data in accordance with GDPR requirements.
privacyPage.content:
Last updated: 2026-04-20

1. General Information

This Privacy Policy explains how Dažai Kirpėjams (the “Seller”, “we”) processes the personal data of buyers and visitors of the website www.dazaikirpejams.lt. The policy is based on the General Data Protection Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and the Lithuanian Law on Legal Protection of Personal Data.

2. Data Controller

  • Name: Džiuljetos Vėbrės individuali veikla (sole proprietorship)
  • Activity registration code: 47003130637
  • Address: Taikos pr. 32, LT-50246 Kaunas, Republic of Lithuania
  • Email: info@dazaikirpejams.lt
  • Phone: +370 680 47667

A Data Protection Officer (DPO) has not been appointed, as the Seller does not meet the mandatory designation criteria under Art. 37 GDPR. For all data protection enquiries please use the contacts above.

3. What data we process and on what legal basis

We only process personal data where we have a lawful basis under Art. 6 GDPR:

  • Order fulfilment (performance of a contract, Art. 6(1)(b)) — first name, last name, email, phone, delivery address; for B2B: company name, registration code, VAT code; order details and payment data.
  • Accounting and legal compliance (Art. 6(1)(c)) — order and invoice data we are required to retain under the Lithuanian Law on Accounting.
  • Customer account administration (performance of a contract) — email, password (hashed), login history, order history.
  • Newsletter and direct marketing (consent, Art. 6(1)(a)) — email address. You may withdraw consent at any time via the unsubscribe link or by contacting us.
  • B2B enquiries (legitimate interest, Art. 6(1)(f)) — contact person's name, email, phone, salon details.
  • Site analytics and security (consent for analytics cookies; legitimate interest for security) — IP address, browser information, browsing data, cookie identifiers.

We do not use Your data for automated decision-making or profiling that produces legal effects on You.

4. Retention periods

  • Order and invoice data — 10 years (under the Lithuanian Law on Accounting).
  • Customer account data — for as long as the account is active; up to 1 year after account deletion.
  • Newsletter subscription — for as long as consent is valid; deleted immediately upon withdrawal.
  • Contact form messages — up to 1 year after the last correspondence.
  • Cookies and analytics data — according to each cookie's lifetime (see section 6).

5. Recipients and processors

The Seller does not disclose Your data to third parties on its own behalf, except to the following key processors with whom data processing agreements have been concluded:

  • Supabase, Inc. (USA / EU) — database and authentication. Data stored in the EU region.
  • Vercel Inc. (USA) — website hosting. Transfers to the USA take place under EU Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) and the EU–US Data Privacy Framework (DPF).
  • Resend, Inc. (USA) — transactional email delivery (order confirmations). Transfers under SCCs.
  • Paysera LT, UAB (Lithuania) — payment processing. The Seller does not receive full payment card details.
  • Google LLC (USA) — Google Analytics 4 (anonymous visitor statistics, with consent only); Google Maps (map display on the contacts page). Transfers under SCCs and the EU–US DPF.
  • Courier and parcel locker services (LP EXPRESS, Omniva, etc.) — parcel delivery (name, address, phone).
  • Public authorities — where required by law.

6. Cookies

We use cookies and similar technologies on the website. Cookies are grouped into categories:

  • Essential cookies (always on) — necessary for site operation: cart state, login session, consent record (cookie-consent-v1). Legal basis: legitimate interest.
  • Analytics cookies (with consent only) — Google Analytics 4 (_ga, _ga_*) — anonymously measure traffic and popular pages. Lifetime up to 2 years.
  • Marketing cookies (with consent only) — currently not in use; if introduced in the future, separate consent will be requested.

Consent is managed via the cookie consent bar (Consent Mode v2). You may withdraw consent at any time via the link at the bottom of the site or in Your browser settings.

7. International data transfers

Where data is transferred outside the European Economic Area (Vercel, Resend, Google), this is done only subject to the safeguards set out in Chapter V of the GDPR: EU Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) and/or participation in the EU–US Data Privacy Framework (DPF).

8. Your rights

Under the GDPR You have the right to:

  • Be informed about the processing;
  • Access Your personal data (Art. 15);
  • Rectify inaccurate data (Art. 16);
  • Erasure (“right to be forgotten”, Art. 17);
  • Restrict processing (Art. 18);
  • Data portability in a structured, machine-readable format (Art. 20);
  • Object to processing, including direct marketing (Art. 21);
  • Withdraw consent at any time (without affecting the lawfulness of prior processing);
  • Lodge a complaint with the supervisory authority — the State Data Protection Inspectorate of the Republic of Lithuania (L. Sapiegos g. 17, 10312 Vilnius, vdai.lrv.lt).

We will respond to Your request within 30 calendar days of receipt.

9. Data security

We implement organisational and technical measures to protect personal data from unauthorised access, disclosure, destruction or alteration: HTTPS encryption, access control, password hashing, regular backups.

10. Is providing data mandatory

Order data (name, contact details, delivery address) is necessary for concluding and performing the contract. If not provided, we cannot fulfil the order. Newsletter subscription is voluntary.

11. Changes to this policy

The Seller reserves the right to amend this Privacy Policy. Material changes will be announced on the Store website and, where appropriate, communicated separately by email.

12. Contact

For all questions regarding personal data processing, please contact us by email at info@dazaikirpejams.lt or by post at Taikos pr. 32, LT-50246 Kaunas.

deliveryPage.freeShippingDesc: For orders from €50, delivery across Lithuania is completely free — regardless of the chosen delivery method.
deliveryPage.returnsSubtitle: Your satisfaction is important to us. Please review the return procedure.
deliveryPage.ret1Desc: You have the right to return the product within 14 calendar days of receipt, without stating a reason.
deliveryPage.ret2Desc: The returned product must be unused, undamaged and in the original manufacturer's packaging with all labels.
deliveryPage.ret3Desc: Cosmetic products that do not have a cardboard box, protective film or special membrane cannot be returned after opening.
deliveryPage.ret4Desc: If You received a defective or incorrect product, contact us — we will replace it free of charge or refund Your money.
deliveryPage.ret5Desc: Upon receiving the returned product, the money is transferred to Your account within 5 business days.
deliveryPage.ret6Desc: Return shipping costs are covered by the buyer, unless the product was defective or delivered incorrectly.
deliveryPage.howRet1Desc: Write to us by email or fill out the contact form, providing the order number and reason for return.
deliveryPage.howRet2Desc: Our team will review Your request and send return confirmation with instructions.
deliveryPage.howRet3Desc: Pack the product and ship it to the specified address. We recommend using a tracked shipping service.
deliveryPage.howRet4Desc: Upon receiving and inspecting the product, we will transfer the money to Your specified account within 5 business days.
deliveryPage.ctaSubtitle: Our team is ready to help. Contact us and we will respond as soon as possible.

faqPage.metaDesc: Answers to key questions about professional hair dyes, ordering, delivery, returns and B2B collaboration.
faqPage.title: Frequently Asked
faqPage.subtitle: Finding Your answer here will save time. If You still have questions — our team is always ready to help.
faqPage.ctaSubtitle: Contact us and our team will be happy to help resolve any question.

items.q: How do your dyes differ from other professional dyes?
items.intro: Our Color SHOCK dyes stand out in several key ways:
list: 180 ml package — twice the size of the standard market offering (60–100 ml), making the price per millilitre significantly lower.
Premium ingredients — the formula contains Argan oil, Jojoba oil and Rose extract, which nourish and protect hair during colouring.
Italian quality — products are manufactured in Italy to the highest quality standards.
Professional pricing — the larger package allows us to offer a competitive price without sacrificing quality.

items.q: Why is the 180 ml package better?
items.intro: The 180 ml package offers clear advantages for professionals:
list: 2× more product — one package equals two standard ones (60–100 ml).
Lower cost per use — the price per millilitre is significantly more economical.
Fewer packages — less frequent ordering, less waste.
Ideal for salons — the larger volume means one package lasts for more procedures.

items.q: Are the dyes suitable for all hair types?
items.text: Yes. Our dyes are formulated for all hair types — from fine to thick, straight to curly. The Argan and Jojoba oils in the formula additionally nourish hair, so the result is smooth and shiny regardless of hair structure.

items.q: How many shades are in the colour palette?
items.intro: We currently offer more than 50 professional shades, grouped into categories:
list: Natural — natural tones
Ash — ash shade series
Copper — copper and warm tones
Red — red shades
Violet — violet series
Superlift — intensive lightening tones
Toner — toning dyes
items.outro: The palette is constantly expanding with new shades.

items.q: Can shades be mixed?
items.text: Yes, professional colourists can freely mix different shades to create unique, individual colours. We recommend following professional colourisation principles and consulting our team about optimal mixing proportions if needed.

items.q: Which oxidant is suitable for your dyes?
items.intro: Our dyes work with oxidants of the following concentrations:
list: 1.5% (5 VOL) — for gentle toning without a lightening effect
3% (10 VOL) — for toning and colour refreshing
6% (20 VOL) — for standard colouring and grey coverage
9% (30 VOL) — for lightening by 2–3 tones
items.outro: Mixing ratio: 1+2 (1 part dye + 2 parts oxidant).

items.q: How do I place an order?
list: Choose your desired products from the catalogue.
Add them to the cart by pressing the “+” button.
Go to the cart, review your order and fill in the delivery details.
Choose a payment method and confirm your order.
items.outro: Once we receive your order, you will get a confirmation email.

items.q: Is there a minimum order amount?
items.text: There is no minimum order for individual purchases — you can order even a single product. B2B clients (salons, barbershops) receive individual terms.

items.q: What payment methods are accepted?
items.intro: We accept several payment methods for your convenience:
list: Bank transfer — payment by proforma invoice.
Payment card — Visa, Mastercard.
Paysera — fast and convenient payment via the electronic banking system.

items.q: Can I get an invoice?
items.text: Yes, for B2B clients (companies, salons) we issue VAT invoices. Provide your company details during the order or contact us by email at info@dazaikirpejams.lt.

items.q: How long does delivery take?
items.text: We deliver orders within 1–3 business days from order confirmation and payment. Delivery time may vary depending on your location and the chosen delivery method.

items.q: How much does delivery cost?
items.text: Delivery cost depends on the chosen method. For orders over €50, delivery within Lithuania is free.

items.q: Can I pick up the order?
items.text: Yes, you can pick up your order in person in Kaunas. The exact pick-up address and time will be provided in the order confirmation. This is a free service.

items.q: Which countries do you deliver to?
items.text: Currently we deliver throughout Lithuania. We are actively expanding our delivery geography and plan to start shipping to other Baltic countries soon.

items.q: Can I return products?
items.text: Yes. Under Lithuanian law, you have the right to return products within 14 days of receipt, provided the products have not been opened, used and are in their original packaging. Cosmetic products without a cardboard box, protective film or special membrane cannot be returned after opening.

items.q: How long is the return period?
items.text: The return period is 14 calendar days from the date of receipt. You must notify us of your decision to return within this period.

items.q: How do I initiate a return?
items.text: To return a product, contact us by email at info@dazaikirpejams.lt, stating your order number and the reason for the return. We will get back to you within 1–2 business days to arrange the return details.

items.q: Do you offer discounts for salons?
items.text: Yes! We offer individual B2B pricing for beauty salons, barbershops and professional colourists, depending on order volumes and regularity.

items.q: How do I become a partner?
items.text: Becoming a partner is very simple: fill in the B2B form on our website (in the “For Salons” section) or contact us directly by email at info@dazaikirpejams.lt.

items.q: Can I get test samples?
items.text: Yes, for potential B2B partners (salons, barbershops) we offer the opportunity to receive test samples so you can evaluate product quality before making a decision.
